title: Added Studio Route URL Builder
summary: Added a shared Studio route URL builder and switched catalogue editor links that append record parameters away from ad hoc query-string concatenation.
effect: Configured Studio routes can now keep transition query state such as `?mode=manage` while browser modules add record parameters such as `work`, `detail`, `series`, or `moment`. This removes a local-app migration risk where callers that used string concatenation could accidentally produce invalid URLs or drop manage mode after route config moved away from Jekyll shells.
verification: Added route URL builder assertions to tests/smoke/local_studio_navigation_adapter.py
JavaScript syntax checks covered the touched Studio config and route modules
Focused local Studio navigation and catalogue editor route smokes covered the changed URL behavior
